description: The AI reviews your data environments overnight and surfaces what matters before you ask a single question.
Ask a plain-language question and receive a sourced answer drawn simultaneously from multiple live data systems.
The AI automatically identifies which members are affected, what they have in common, and where friction is occurring — without manual analysis.
Instead of reporting what happened, the AI tells you what is likely to happen next — so you can act before members disengage or churn.
Detects unusual patterns across member transactions, contact center volume, and workflow exceptions in real time — and surfaces them as prioritized, actionable signals.
From the same conversation, the AI executes actions across your existing systems — JIRA, Slack, Salesforce AgentForce — with your confirmation at every step.
